stemHtml: You are flying a jet transport aeroplane at the maximum cruise altitude, limited by the 1.3g buffet margin when you suddenly encounter clear air turbulence (CAT). Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The instantaneous gust loading from CAT may increase the load factor to exceed 1.3g.
options.b: The aircraft's optimum altitude immediately decreases, prompting a descent.
options.c: The instantaneous load factor remains 1.0g because CAT has no effect on load factor.
options.d: The aircraft will stall because the available buffet margin is reduced to zero.
